products.eduxgen_desc: Generate complete lesson plans, questions and assessments in minutes using artificial intelligence.
products.myclass_desc: Complete task management and pedagogical monitoring system for teachers and managers.
products.personas_desc: AI virtual assistant that answers students' questions in natural language.
products.eduxrealms_desc: Immersive experiences created from real environments to engage students.
products.iptv_desc: Video conferencing platform with multimedia chat and support for large-scale events.
products.conteudo_desc: Partnership with Smile and Learn offering educational multimedia content.
products.heading: A family of products for the entire educational journey
products.sub: From AI content generation to live streaming, we have the right tool for every moment.

hero.subtitle: Over 9 million students and 350K teachers across Brazil trust Realms to power learning with technology.

contact_page.hero_tagline: Get in Touch — We're here to help
contact_page.hero_description: Have a question, want to schedule a demo or explore a partnership? Our team responds within 5 business days.
contact_page.gmail_notice: When you click Send Message, Gmail will open so you can complete sending to comercial@realms.com.br.
contact_page.modal_description: You will be redirected to Gmail to finish sending your message to comercial@realms.com.br.
contact_page.message_placeholder: Tell us how we can help...
contact_page.success_sub: Our team will be in touch shortly.
contact_page.response_desc: Our team responds to all messages within 5 business days.
contact_page.faq1_q: How does the free demo work?
contact_page.faq1_a: Just fill out the form requesting a demo. A Realms specialist will get back to you within 5 business days to schedule a personalized presentation for your institution.
contact_page.faq2_a: Yes! We have special plans for public school networks. Contact us to learn about pricing and conditions for your district or city.
contact_page.faq3_a: Basic implementation takes 5 to 10 business days. Larger projects with custom integrations can take 4 to 8 weeks, with dedicated support throughout.
contact_page.faq4_q: Do you offer support in Portuguese?
contact_page.faq4_a: Yes, all support is provided in Portuguese (PT-BR) and English via chat, email and phone on business days.

about_page.hero_description: An EdTech company founded by passionate educators, dedicated to transforming Brazilian education with cutting-edge technology. Over 20 years connecting teachers, students and institutions.
about_page.timeline_sub: From a classroom dream to a platform that impacts millions of lives.
about_page.tl_2004_desc: We were born in São Paulo with the mission to bring technology to Brazilian classrooms.
about_page.tl_2008_desc: We reached 100 thousand active students and expanded to 5 states across Brazil.
about_page.tl_2014_desc: Brazil's first AI-powered educational content generation platform.
about_page.tl_2018_desc: The IP.TV solution reached 10 thousand simultaneous classrooms nationwide.
about_page.tl_2021_desc: We brought our solutions to more than 8 countries across Latin America.
about_page.tl_2024_desc: Reached 9 million active students — the largest EdTech ecosystem in Brazil.
about_page.val_innovation_desc: We create technology that redefines possibilities and anticipates the future of education.
about_page.val_access_desc: Quality education should be within reach for everyone, regardless of context.
about_page.val_impact_desc: Every decision is measured by the real impact it generates in teachers' and students' lives.
about_page.val_excellence_desc: We never stop improving — today's best is tomorrow's starting point.
about_page.team_sub: A group of visionaries passionate about education and technology.
about_page.cta_sub: Discover how Realms can empower your institution and change the lives of your students.

about.heading: Built by educators, for educators
about.body1: Realms was born from the belief that technology should amplify human potential — not replace it. With over 20 years of EdTech experience, we build tools that put teachers at the center.
about.body2: Our mission is simple: give educators superpowers with AI, so they can do more in less time and engage students like never before.

testimonials.heading: Those who use it, approve it

press_page.hero_description: Check out the latest news, features and press recognition about Realms and the transformative impact of our educational solutions.
press_page.news_sub: Features, interviews and press coverage from national and international media.
press_page.item1_title: How Realms is redefining education with AI in Brazil
press_page.item2_title: Realms raises $10M to expand EdTech platform across Latin America

press_page.contact_desc: For interviews, features and press materials, contact our communications team.
press_page.kit_desc: Logos, brand assets, executive photos and company fact sheet.
press_page.cta_sub: Our communications team is ready to work with journalists, podcasters and content creators.

press.heading: Realms in the spotlight
press.sub: Check out the latest news and press coverage about our solutions.
press.article1_title: Realms launches new AI platform for Brazilian educators
press.article2_title: Brazilian EdTech reaches historic milestone of 9 million students

home.products_subtitle: Innovative educational technology solutions built for the future of learning
home.cta_subtitle: Join thousands of educators and students already using our platform

footer.tagline: Transforming education with technology for over 20 years.

eduxgen.hero_subtitle: AI-powered educational content generation platform for educators and institutions
eduxgen.content_text: EduXGen.ai leverages cutting-edge artificial intelligence to generate personalized educational content at scale. From lesson plans to assessments, our AI writes it all.

myclass.hero_subtitle: Complete classroom management and collaborative learning solution
myclass.content_text: MyClass provides teachers and students with all the tools needed for effective remote and in-person learning — from live sessions to assignments, grades and more.

personas.hero_subtitle: Personalized adaptive learning journeys for every student
personas.content_text: Realms Personas creates unique learning profiles that adapt to each student's pace, style, and goals — delivering hyper-personalized educational pathways.

eduxrealms.hero_subtitle: Immersive educational environments powered by 3D and gamification
eduxrealms.content_text: EduxRealms brings education to life through interactive 3D environments and gamified learning experiences that captivate and engage students.

iptv.content_text: Deliver high-quality educational content through IPTV infrastructure to reach students everywhere — including areas with limited internet connectivity.

conteudo.hero_subtitle: Partnership with Smile and Learn offering educational multimedia content
conteudo.content_text: In partnership with Smile and Learn, we offer an extensive library of multimedia educational content covering the entire school journey, from kindergarten through high school.
conteudo.cta_text: Bring rich and engaging content to every student, on any device, with expert curation.

about.hero_subtitle: Our story, mission and the values that drive us
about.content_text: We are a leading EdTech company dedicated to transforming education through innovative technology solutions. Our team of passionate engineers, educators, and designers work together to make learning more effective and accessible for everyone.
about.mission_text: To democratize high-quality education by putting powerful technology in the hands of educators and learners worldwide.
about.vision_text: A world where every learner has access to personalized, high-quality education regardless of location or background.

press.hero_subtitle: Latest news, announcements and media coverage
press.content_text: Stay up to date with our latest news, press releases, and media appearances. For press inquiries, please contact our communications team.

contact.hero_subtitle: Get in touch — we'd love to hear from you
contact.content_text: Have a question or want to learn more about our products? Fill out the form below and our team will get back to you within 5 business days.
contact.name: Full Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.success: Message sent successfully! We'll be in touch soon.

eduxgen_page.hero_desc: The platform that transforms your idea into complete educational content in seconds — for any grade level, subject, and pedagogical goal.
eduxgen_page.features_desc: From kindergarten to higher education, EduXGen.ai adapts content to the level, subject, and goal of each educator.
eduxgen_page.feature_1_desc: Generate complete plans with objectives, methodology, resources and assessment aligned to curriculum standards in seconds.
eduxgen_page.feature_2_desc: Create exercises, open-ended and multiple choice questions at any difficulty level.
eduxgen_page.feature_3_desc: Personalized tests with automatic answer keys, grading rubrics and performance analysis.
eduxgen_page.feature_4_desc: Reinforcement activities, projects and challenges adapted to each class's profile and pace.
eduxgen_page.feature_5_desc: Personalized schedules based on pedagogical goals, deadlines and learning gaps.
eduxgen_page.feature_6_desc: Content generated in Portuguese, English and Spanish with automatic cultural adaptations.
eduxgen_page.step_1_desc: Type the topic, grade level, subject and content type. Our AI understands natural language.
eduxgen_page.step_2_desc: In seconds, you receive complete, structured material aligned to curriculum guidelines.
eduxgen_page.step_3_desc: Edit, adjust the tone, add your branding, and export to PDF, Word, or integrate directly with your LMS.
eduxgen_page.levels_desc: Our AI automatically adapts the language, depth and format of content according to the educational level — no technical configuration needed.
eduxgen_page.testimonials_h2: Those who use it, love it
eduxgen_page.testimonial_1_quote: In 5 minutes I create complete curriculum-aligned assessments. It's like having a pedagogical assistant always available. It revolutionized my practice.
eduxgen_page.testimonial_2_quote: EduXGen saves me at least 8 hours a week. I can focus on what really matters: teaching and engaging with my students.
eduxgen_page.testimonial_3_quote: We deployed EduXGen across the entire network and content standardization improved greatly. Teachers love how easy it is to use.
eduxgen_page.cta_desc: Join over 50,000 educators who have automated educational content creation with artificial intelligence.

myclass_page.hero_desc: Manage classes, run live lessons, administer assessments and track each student's performance in real time — all in one integrated platform.
myclass_page.intro_p1: MyClass is a complete classroom management and collaborative learning solution. Centralize classes, materials, assessments and communication in one smart environment.
myclass_page.intro_p2: Teachers gain powerful tools to create content, administer quizzes and monitor individual performance. Students access everything from their phone or computer wherever they are.
myclass_page.intro_feat_1: Live classes with chat, polls and interactive whiteboard
myclass_page.intro_feat_2: Class management, assignments and school calendar
myclass_page.intro_feat_4: Performance dashboard by student and class
myclass_page.intro_feat_5: Integrated communication between teachers, students and parents
myclass_page.intro_feat_6: Access via phone, computer and tablet
myclass_page.platforms_desc: Designed to work seamlessly on all platforms — from the classroom to studying at home, always connected.
myclass_page.platform_web_desc: Complete panel for teachers to manage classes, create content, administer assessments and track performance.
myclass_page.platform_live_desc: Integrated video conferencing with whiteboard, polls, chat and automatic recording for later review.
myclass_page.platform_mobile_desc: Students and teachers access everything via smartphone — assignment notifications, materials and live class participation.
myclass_page.users_desc: Each profile has a personalized experience. Teachers with full management control; students focused on learning and collaboration.
myclass_page.teacher_feat_1: Create classes, rosters and school calendar
myclass_page.teacher_feat_2: AI-powered question bank for automatic generation
myclass_page.teacher_feat_5: Direct communication with students and parents
myclass_page.student_feat_1: Personalized feed with daily assignments and materials
myclass_page.student_feat_2: Live participation with reactions and real-time questions
myclass_page.student_feat_5: Smart notifications for deadlines and new content
myclass_page.features_desc: Everything you need to transform teaching into a complete and efficient experience.
myclass_page.feat_1_desc: Video conferencing with interactive whiteboard, real-time polls and automatic recording.
myclass_page.feat_2_desc: Automatically generate assessments with AI based on class content and submitted materials.
myclass_page.feat_3_desc: Detailed performance, attendance and engagement reports by student, class and subject.
myclass_page.feat_4_desc: Create, organize and reuse questions in multiple formats: multiple choice, open-ended and more.
myclass_page.feat_5_desc: Students form groups, share materials and collaborate on projects within the platform.
myclass_page.feat_6_desc: Automatic alerts for deadlines, new assignments, messages and school calendar events.
myclass_page.feat_7_desc: School agenda synchronized with all classes, exams, events and pedagogical meetings.
myclass_page.feat_8_desc: Store and organize videos, PDFs, presentations and links accessible at any time.
myclass_page.feat_9_desc: Data protected with end-to-end encryption, LGPD compliance and role-based access control.
myclass_page.cta_desc: Give your students and teachers the best teaching and learning experience. The future of education is connected, intelligent and starts with MyClass.

personas_page.hero_desc: Conversational AI avatars you train with your own content. Intelligent assistants ready to engage with students, teachers and teams.
personas_page.intro_p1: Realms Personas are conversational AI assistants with their own personality. Each Persona can be trained with your institution's content — textbooks, videos, documents and class materials — and starts answering questions like a human expert.
personas_page.intro_p2: Unlike generic chatbots, Personas carry your identity, context and pedagogy. The result: fluid conversations, accurate answers and more engaged students at any hour of the day.
personas_page.intro_bubble1: Explain photosynthesis to me in simple terms.
personas_page.intro_bubble2: Sure! Photosynthesis is the process by which plants convert sunlight into energy...
personas_page.capabilities_desc: Conversational AI avatars trained with your content. Every feature is designed to transform the educational experience for students and teachers.
personas_page.cap_1_desc: Each Persona maintains contextual dialogues continuously, responding in natural language just like a human would.
personas_page.cap_2_desc: You feed the Persona with materials, textbooks and data from your institution. It learns and responds with your identity.
personas_page.cap_3_desc: Define tone, name, avatar and behavior. Create a Persona that matches your school or course identity.
personas_page.cap_4_desc: Answers students' questions about instructional content at any hour, reducing the teacher's workload.
personas_page.cap_5_desc: Guides students and teachers through materials, playlists and educational resources interactively and intelligently.
personas_page.cap_6_desc: Monitor interactions to discover the most frequent questions and identify learning gaps in real time.
personas_page.how_desc: Set up, train and publish your Persona in minutes. No code, no complexity.
personas_page.step_1_desc: Define the name, personality and the ideal type of assistant for your needs.
personas_page.step_2_desc: Upload PDFs, videos, textbooks and content. The AI learns from your material.
personas_page.step_3_desc: Make it available to students and teachers. The Persona is ready to converse.
personas_page.cases_desc: From the classroom to institutional support — Personas adapt to any educational need.
personas_page.card_talk_desc: A humanized assistant trained to answer your questions
personas_page.case_1_desc: Available 24/7, the Persona answers questions about content, explains concepts with examples and suggests supplementary materials — like having a personal tutor always by your side.
personas_page.case_1_pt2: Explains content with analogies and examples
personas_page.case_2_desc: Teachers and managers train the Persona with their materials and it becomes an intelligent extension of the team, distributing content and guidance automatically and at scale.
personas_page.case_2_pt4: Frees the teacher for richer lessons
personas_page.cta_desc: Set up in minutes and offer a unique educational experience for your students and team.

eduxrealms_page.hero_desc: Explore interactive 3D worlds, learn through gamification and dive into experiences with Virtual Reality headsets. Accessible from mobile, computer or VR headset.
eduxrealms_page.intro_p1: EduxRealms is an interactive 3D system that transforms learning into a gamified adventure in the metaverse. Explore virtual classrooms, complete quests and immerse yourself in worlds that feel like games — but truly teach.
eduxrealms_page.intro_p2: With support for Virtual Reality headsets, you see educational elements up close with full immersion — as if you were inside the universe. Everything accessible via mobile, computer or VR headset.
eduxrealms_page.intro_feat_6: Access via mobile, computer or VR headset
eduxrealms_page.platforms_desc: Designed to work on all platforms — from the most immersive VR headset experience to quick smartphone access.
eduxrealms_page.platform_vr_desc: Full immersion in 3D worlds. See elements at real scale, interact with your hands and feel like you're inside the educational universe.
eduxrealms_page.platform_pc_desc: Access all 3D worlds via browser, no installation needed. Complete interface with all platform features.
eduxrealms_page.platform_mobile_desc: Take 3D worlds in your pocket. Native app with augmented reality using the phone camera to overlay content on the real world.
eduxrealms_page.worlds_desc: Each subject has its own interactive universe. Travel through the solar system learning science, explore ancient civilizations in history or solve equations in a mathematical dimension.
eduxrealms_page.world_1_desc: Orbit planets, observe chemical reactions in 3D and explore the solar system at real scale.
eduxrealms_page.world_2_desc: Explore Ancient Egypt in 3D: walk among pyramids, decipher hieroglyphs and relive the mysteries of the pharaohs.
eduxrealms_page.world_3_desc: Discover the beauty of symmetry in 3D space: explore geometric figures, axes of symmetry and interactive visual patterns.
eduxrealms_page.world_4_desc: Learn Portuguese in a visual way: explore vowels, consonants and word structures in interactive 3D environments.
eduxrealms_page.world_5_desc: Understand the importance of recycling and the environment: see the impact of waste on the planet and how small actions make a big difference.
eduxrealms_page.world_6_desc: Explore the periodic table in 3D, get to know the chemical elements and see how atoms and molecules form everything around you.
eduxrealms_page.features_desc: Everything you need to transform learning into an unforgettable adventure.
eduxrealms_page.feat_1_desc: Quests, knowledge boss battles and educational puzzles to engage students in learning.
eduxrealms_page.feat_2_desc: Native support for Meta Quest, Apple Vision Pro, Pico and other market headsets.
eduxrealms_page.feat_3_desc: Completely interactive environments where every object can be explored and analyzed.
eduxrealms_page.feat_4_desc: Study with classmates in the same virtual world with 3D avatars and real-time collaboration.
eduxrealms_page.feat_5_desc: Complete gamification system with trophies, medals, leaderboard and level progression.
eduxrealms_page.feat_6_desc: Teachers track individual student progress and engagement in real time.
eduxrealms_page.feat_7_desc: The system learns from each student and adapts challenges to their level and learning pace.
eduxrealms_page.feat_8_desc: Visit museums, historical monuments, the ocean floor and other places without leaving school.
eduxrealms_page.feat_9_desc: iOS and Android app with integrated augmented reality using the phone camera.
eduxrealms_page.cta_desc: Take your students to worlds they never imagined. The future of education is immersive, gamified and incredible — and it starts with EduxRealms.

iptv_page.hero_desc: HD video conferences, interactive webinars and live streaming — all in one platform built for education, corporate and digital events.
iptv_page.intro_p1: IP.TV is Realms' video conferencing platform, designed to transform meetings, live classes and broadcasts into fluid, secure and high-quality experiences — regardless of distance.
iptv_page.intro_p2: With support for up to 1,000 simultaneous participants, personalized virtual rooms, screen sharing, collaborative whiteboard and automatic cloud recording, IP.TV delivers everything educators, teams and creators need.
iptv_page.intro_feat_1: Video in HD up to 4K at 60 frames per second
iptv_page.intro_feat_2: Rooms with up to 1,000 simultaneous participants
iptv_page.intro_feat_4: Automatic recording saved to the cloud
iptv_page.platforms_desc: No hardware barriers. Access via browser, mobile app or integrate via API — the experience is always consistent and high quality.
iptv_page.platform_web_desc: Join any meeting directly via link with no installation needed. Works in any modern browser.
iptv_page.platform_mobile_desc: Native iOS and Android app with optimized small-screen interface, push notifications and quick access to rooms.
iptv_page.platform_desktop_desc: Native application for Windows and macOS with advanced features, low latency and multi-monitor support.
iptv_page.usecases_desc: From in-person teaching broadcast live to large corporate events — IP.TV adapts to your context with personalized rooms and specific tools for each scenario.
iptv_page.usecase_1_desc: Teacher broadcasts to hundreds of students with interaction via chat, hand raise and real-time quiz.
iptv_page.usecase_2_desc: Private rooms for teams with integrated agenda, automatic recording and AI summary.
iptv_page.usecase_3_desc: Lecture with up to 1,000 viewers, audience control, moderated Q&A and co-presenters.
iptv_page.usecase_4_desc: Integration with YouTube, Twitch and social networks for simultaneous event streaming across multiple platforms.
iptv_page.usecase_5_desc: Breakout rooms for smaller groups, integrated assessments and automatic attendance tracking.
iptv_page.usecase_6_desc: Virtual stages, networking lounges, sponsor booths and multi-room broadcasting.
iptv_page.features_desc: Everything you need to conduct meetings, classes and digital events professionally and efficiently.
iptv_page.feat_1_desc: Crystal-clear image quality with 1080p and 4K at 60fps support, automatically adapting to available bandwidth.
iptv_page.feat_2_desc: Share the entire screen, a specific window or a browser tab with full quality.
iptv_page.feat_3_desc: Infinite canvas for annotations, drawings and diagrams in real time with all participants.
iptv_page.feat_4_desc: AI-powered noise cancellation that eliminates background sounds and ensures crystal-clear voice in any environment.
iptv_page.feat_5_desc: Real-time chat with emoji reactions, polls, hand raise and moderated Q&A mode.
iptv_page.feat_6_desc: Automatically record every meeting with AI transcription, chapters and highlights generated after the session.
iptv_page.feat_7_desc: At the end of each session, AI generates a summary with decisions made, assigned tasks and next steps.
iptv_page.feat_8_desc: End-to-end encryption, password-protected rooms, waiting room and full access control for the organizer.
iptv_page.feat_9_desc: Connect with Google Calendar, Microsoft Teams, Slack, Notion, LMS and the entire Realms platform.
iptv_page.cta_desc: Meetings, classes and digital events with the quality and security your team deserves.

conteudo_page.hero_desc: In partnership with Smile and Learn, Realms brings a library of over 7,000 interactive educational games and activities, covering the entire school journey from kindergarten to high school.
conteudo_page.games_instruction: Click any game to open it. Filter by subject.
conteudo_page.games_showing: Showing {{count}} of {{total}} available games • Links will be activated soon
conteudo_page.games_none: No games found for this filter.
conteudo_page.games_modal_coming: This game's link is not yet configured. Check back soon!
conteudo_page.levels_desc: Because it is more motivating, more visual, more interactive, more personalized and more inclusive for every student.
conteudo_page.benefit_3_desc: Helps students engage in their own learning.
conteudo_page.benefit_4_desc: Adapts content to different classroom paces.
conteudo_page.platform_feat_1_desc: Content available without internet after the first download — ideal for schools with limited connectivity.
conteudo_page.platform_feat_2_desc: Teachers and managers track each student's performance in real time by game, subject and skill.
conteudo_page.platform_feat_3_desc: The algorithm automatically adjusts the difficulty level to keep each student always at the right challenge point.
conteudo_page.cta_desc: Over 7,000 educational games in 16 languages. Available online and offline.
